message:
feat(runtime): add immediate-drain config, stats, and spin-storm prevention

Add ImmediateDrainConfig to bound the zero-timeout poll burst loop in
the runtime main loop, preventing spin storms during bursty input:
- Configurable max_zero_timeout_polls_per_burst (default 64)
- max_burst_duration cap (default 2ms) with backoff_timeout (1ms)
- ImmediateDrainStats counters for burst/poll/backoff observability
- Runtime integration with drain_budget tracking per iteration
- Builder API extensions for drain configuration
- Comprehensive tests for budget exhaustion and backoff behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
